'''tapama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uggo|uggo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uggo|uggo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tapama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpæmæth|tæpæmæth]] || [[word:tæpæmæj|tæpæmæj]] || [[word:tæpæmæsh|tæpæmæsh]] || [[word:tæpæmæ|tæpæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapapamath|tapapamath]] || [[word:tapapamaj|tapapamaj]] || [[word:tapapamash|tapapamash]] || [[word:tapapama|tapapama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tapamath|tapamath]] || [[word:tapamaj|tapamaj]] || [[word:tapamash|tapamash]] || [[word:tapama|tapama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapafmath|tapafmath]] || [[word:tapafmaj|tapafmaj]] || [[word:tapafmash|tapafmash]] || [[word:tapafmaf|tapafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tapamatha|tapamatha]] || [[word:tapamaja|tapamaja]] || [[word:tapamasha|tapamasha]] || [[word:tapamaka|tapamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tapamath|tapamath]] || [[word:tapamaj|tapamaj]] || [[word:tapamash|tapamash]] || [[word:tapama|tapama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tapamathal|tapamathal]] || [[word:tapamajal|tapamajal]] || [[word:tapamashal|tapamashal]] || [[word:tapamakal|tapamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tapamathatha|tapamathatha]] || [[word:tapamajaja|tapamajaja]] || [[word:tapamashasha|tapamashasha]] || [[word:tapamaka|tapamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tapamathan|tapamathan]] || [[word:tapamajan|tapamajan]] || [[word:tapamashan|tapamashan]] || [[word:tapamakan|tapamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tapamathaoro|tapamathaoro]] || [[word:tapamajaoro|tapamajaoro]] || [[word:tapamashaoro|tapamashaoro]] || [[word:tapamakaoro|tapamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
